posts.author: JulianWollmann (Julian Wollmann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently on the mobile app on an Apple device I am noticing that I cannot update a mirror collumn’s. Staus ( I get a not supported on mobile device error .

Since this is such a main feature in Monday to change staus- this should be a high priority to develop that capability in the app as well.
